nasb.text: wanting to be teachers of the Law, even though they do not understand either what they are saying or the matters about which they make confident assertions.

esv.text: desiring to be teachers of the law, without understanding either what they are saying or the things about which they make confident assertions.

cnv.text: 想要作律法教師，卻不明白自己講的是甚麼，主張的又是甚麼。

ccb.text: 他们想做律法教师，却不明白自己所谈论所主张的。

csbs.text: 想要做律法教师，却不明白自己所讲的，或所强调的是为了什么。
